authority.change_policy: immutable_after_first_decisive_inference; changes require a new version and a new pre-run hash

purpose: Decide whether controlled-label GLiREL candidates improve evidence-grounded ClaimRecordV1 compilation enough to own Stage 4. Relations remain observation-only unless the decisive arm passes every gate.

glirel.reason_legacy_type_gate_disabled: the legacy gate can rewrite an owner-controlled label to related_to, which is outside the C2 vocabulary

decisive.name: production_shaped_gliner
decisive.entities: GLiNER predictions under the exact owner entity-label registry
decisive.without: certified spaCy observation and ClaimRecordV1 compilers with the decisive entities and zero relation candidates
decisive.with: the identical bundle, predicates, and decisive entities plus exact-controlled-label GLiREL candidates

diagnostic.name: oracle_gold_spans
diagnostic.entities: gold entity spans translated into owner EntityType solely for an entity-recall diagnostic

candidate_binding.relation_labels: exact owner PredicateType values only; no legacy relation-label crosswalk
candidate_binding.entity_resolution: a GLiREL endpoint must resolve to exactly one same-sample EntityMention
candidate_binding.predicate_resolution: a proposal binds only when exactly one typed predicate in the evidence sentence has normalized_predicate equal to the GLiREL label
candidate_binding.compiler_acceptance: ClaimRecordV1 compiler independently requires dependency subject direction, dependency object direction, and evidence-sentence agreement
candidate_binding.unbound_policy: retain as counted observation-only proposals; never coerce a label or predicate_id

decision_base.unit: one gold claim matched by sample and predicate-lemma occurrence to a typed compiled ClaimRecordV1 with dependency subject and object arguments
decision_base.expected_support_key: sample_id + normalized_predicate + predicate_lemma occurrence + normalized dependency subject surfaces + normalized dependency object surfaces
decision_base.predicted_support_key: the owning compiled claim key for each compiler-accepted source_relation_id; duplicate accepted relations are duplicate predictions, not free true positives
decision_base.thin_evidence_rationale: The assigned fixture is a small adversarial canary, so a legitimate strict-improvement reading requires more than isolated examples and must span multiple samples and controlled predicate families. Falling below any minimum yields insufficient_evidence, never pass.

verdict_precedence: If any thin-evidence minimum is missed: insufficient_evidence and relations remain observation-only.
Else if every pass gate is true: with_wins and Stage-4 GLiREL may proceed to owner ratification.
Else: without_wins and relations remain observation-only.
diagnostics_without_verdict_weight: legacy exact relation-span F1 with no label crosswalk
GLiREL proposals whose endpoints agree with an UNTYPED compiled claim
anti_gaming: No sample-ID, text, or gold-answer branching in inference or binding.
No post-run threshold, label, denominator, crosswalk, or gate edits.
The same entities and deterministic compiler inputs are used in WITH and WITHOUT within each arm.
All claims and relations remain candidate or observation-only; the benchmark performs no provider call, persistence, promotion, graph write, or vector write.
